name: New Leaf Ventures Inc
summary: New Leaf Ventures Inc. focuses on the extraction, production, and processing of cannabis and related products. The company provides dried flower, oil concentrate, vapor, capsules, and wax under the D√É¬ÄM√É¬Ä brand; and outdoor flower and non-connoisseur products under the WEED brand. It also licenses its brands, equipment, and facility to a Washington-based Tier 3 producer/processor focused on cultivating, processing, packaging, and distributing cannabis and cannabis related products. The company was incorporated in 2018 and is based in Vancouver, Canada.
